case_title: ISOLA DICKSON ET AL VS. THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF DICKSON, ISOLA INDIVIDUALLY AND AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO IAN DICKSON, DECEASED DICKSON, MARION DICKSON, ANGELA DICKSON, RICHARD
MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-15-2021 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION DEPT. 302 - DEFENDANT REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA'S DEMURRER TO PRO PER PLAINTIFFS' COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 20 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. THE COMPLAINT WAS FILED ON JUNE 11, 2020, BUT IT PLEADS THAT PLAINTIFFS "WERE IN COMMUNICATIONS" WITH DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVES "RELATING TO ALLEGATIONS OF NEGLIGENCE FROM SHORTLY AFTER [DECEDENT'S] DEATH" ON NOVEMBER 4, 2018. (ID. AT 3:17-22.) THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS FOR MEDICAL MALPRACTICE IS ONE YEAR FROM DISCOVERY OF INJURY. (CCP 340.5.) PLAINTIFFS FAILED TO FILE AN OPPOSITION TO DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER. PLAINTIFFS ARE GIVEN LEAVE TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT IF THEY CAN DO SO IN GOOD FAITH. WRITTEN ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER; CLERK: J. RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM.

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-15-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances by ZOOM Video-conferencing:

No appearance is made in this matter.

On calendar for hearing:
DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA DEMURRER to COMPLAINT

The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant Regents of the University of California's demurrer to pro per plaintiffs' complaint is sustained with 20 days leave to amend. The complaint was filed on June 11, 2020, but it pleads that plaintiffs "were in communications" with defendant's representatives "relating to allegations of negligence from shortly after [decedent's] death" on November 4, 2018. (Id. at 3:17-22.) The statute of limitations for medical malpractice is one year from discovery of injury. (CCP 340.5.) Plaintiffs failed to file an opposition to defendant's demurrer. Plaintiffs are given leave to amend the complaint if they can do so in good faith.

Written order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-29-2020 Continued To Jan-20-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
